# On the transversals of Latin squares generated by nonlinear bipermutive cellular automata

**Autori:** Alberto Dennunzio, Maximilien Gadouleau, Luca Mariot · **2026** · [ArXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18875) · [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.18875)

## Abstract

Characterization of bipermutive cellular automata generating Latin squares with orthogonal mates. The study determines conditions for transversals on the main diagonal and identifies the smallest diameter for nonlinear examples.
